chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1378 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.12.2024 Mr. Abdul Ghafoor, advocate for petitioner *** This petition appears to be misconceived inasmuch as on the one hand it is claimed that land of the petitioner has been compulsorily acquired without compensation, and the petitioner seeking compensation as per market value, whereas on the other hand it has been prayed that the respondents be restrained from causing any damage to the crops of the petitioner on such land, suggesting that the same remains under his possession. Even otherwise, the petition is bereft of relevant particulars and the petitioner has not even filed any document to substantiate his claim, albeit being put on notice to do so as far back as 31.08.2021. Under the circumstances, the petition is found to be misconceived and stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
